items.title: Thieves stole 96 bananas from Wawa in Montgomery County, police say
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ships still cautious about using Strait of Hormuz as Iran issues warning
items.dek: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.
items.body: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Germany suspends military approval for long stays abroad for men under 45
items.dek: The requirement to obtain permission had gone largely unnoticed until a German newspaper reported on it.
items.body: The requirement to obtain permission had gone largely unnoticed until a German newspaper reported on it.
items.author: IriLine Desk
